message:
fix(tests): relax MessagePort assertion for shared-worker coordinator, update DTS contract to source-only

Two WASM test updates:

1. **wasm_browser_feasibility_matrix.rs**: The browser SDK boundary
   assertion previously rejected any mention of MessagePort.  Now
   that the SharedWorker coordinator legitimately uses MessagePort
   for its per-client attach protocol, the assertion is relaxed to
   only reject BroadcastChannel (which remains outside the public
   surface).  A positive assertion confirms MessagePort appears
   alongside createBrowserSharedWorkerCoordinatorSelection.

2. **wasm_js_exports_coverage_contract.rs**: The shared-worker
   coordinator export test was checking dist/index.d.ts (the
   compiled declaration file).  Updated to check the source
   index.ts instead, matching all other tests in the file, and
   avoiding build-order dependencies.  Assertion markers updated
   to match source-level patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
